MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED., APR-07-2010: MICHAEL S. ROSSOFF, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; PROPERTY MANAGER PETE DAVIS IS PRESENT ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. FULL SCOPE ATTORNEY ERIK JENNINGS, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT ROSA MARIE KILROY, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DATE THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT CHRIS KILROY THIS DAY AT THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. THE CASE SETTLES. PARTIES AGREE AND SIGN SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WHICH IS NOT FILED WITH THE COURT THIS DAY. TRIAL DATE REMOVED.

JPT ANDREW WESTLEY; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-218).
